StackView.Name: HeroContent
StackView.TextBlock: A modern UI engine for games and native apps. Compose layouts from grids, stacks, text, and images — all rendered at 60 fps.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: CardText
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Text Rendering
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Pixel-perfect typography with kerning, multi-language support, and full font control.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: CardLayout
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Flexible Layouts
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Grid and stack containers that adapt to any resolution, defined declaratively in XML.

TextBlock.Name: CardImageTitle
TextBlock.Text: Image Integration

TextBlock.Name: CardImageBody
TextBlock.Text: Fast texture loading with stretch, crop, and nine-patch rendering built in.

TextBlock.Name: GallerySubheading
TextBlock.Text: Screenshots and scenes rendered entirely by the ORCA engine.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: GalleryCard1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Lake Scene
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Real-time reflections and water surface rendered at 60 fps.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: GalleryCard2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: High-fidelity texture sampling with anisotropic filtering.

TextBlock.Name: WorkflowHeading
TextBlock.Text: How It Works

TextBlock.Name: WorkflowSubheading
TextBlock.Text: From XML layout to a live rendered scene in four simple steps.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Step1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Define Layout
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Write your screen as an XML file with familiar Grid and StackView containers.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Step2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Load Assets
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Images, fonts, and data files are streamed from packages at runtime.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Step3
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Script Logic
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Attach Lua scripts to any component for interactivity and data binding.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Step4
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Deploy to desktop, mobile, or WebGL with a single build command.

TextBlock.Name: TestimonialsHeading
TextBlock.Text: What Developers Say

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Quote1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: — Alex R.
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Lead Engineer
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: ORCA lets us ship native-quality UI on every platform from a single XML source. It changed how we build products.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Quote2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: — Sam T.
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: UI Architect
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: The declarative layout system is a joy to work with. Our designers write XML and developers hook up the logic — perfect split.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Quote3
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: — Jordan M.
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Game Developer
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Sub-millisecond frame times even on mid-range hardware. We ditched our old HTML renderer the day we tried ORCA.

TextBlock.Name: CtaHeading
TextBlock.Text: Ready to build something great?

TextBlock.Name: CtaBody
TextBlock.Text: Download ORCA, open a sample project, and have your first screen running in minutes.

TextBlock.Name: CtaButtonPrimary
TextBlock.Text: Get Started

TextBlock.Name: CtaButtonSecondary
TextBlock.Text: View on GitHub

TextBlock.Name: TabbedShowcaseHeading
TextBlock.Text: More to explore in tabs

TextBlock.Name: TabbedShowcaseSubheading
TextBlock.Text: Tabs add a second layer of story, with dedicated imagery and focused content that keeps the landing page rich.

TextBlock.Name: OverviewTitle
TextBlock.Text: Why tabs here?

TextBlock.Name: OverviewBody
TextBlock.Text: These tabs are for deeper slices of the same story: more visuals, more implementation notes, and more reasons to keep exploring without crowding the main page.

TextBlock.Name: OverviewBullet1
TextBlock.Text: • Tabs now complement the landing page instead of replacing it.

TextBlock.Name: OverviewBullet2
TextBlock.Text: • The first tab is selected explicitly, matching WPF TabControl-style defaults.

TextBlock.Name: OverviewBullet3
TextBlock.Text: • We can mix prefabs, text, and freshly downloaded images in each pane.

TextBlock.Name: ImagesTitle
TextBlock.Text: Image board

TextBlock.Name: ImagesBody
TextBlock.Text: A mix of existing sample assets and newly downloaded imagery keeps the page from feeling repetitive.

TextBlock.Name: ImageCard1Body
TextBlock.Text: A calm scene to contrast with the darker palette.

TextBlock.Name: ImageCard2Body
TextBlock.Text: A high-detail image for texture-heavy tabs.

TextBlock.Name: ImageCard3Title
TextBlock.Text: City lights

TextBlock.Name: ImageCard3Body
TextBlock.Text: One of the freshly downloaded tab images.

TextBlock.Name: ImageCard4Title
TextBlock.Text: Night glow

TextBlock.Name: ImageCard4Body
TextBlock.Text: Downloaded to give the tab set a different mood.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: WorkflowTab1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Sketch the page with a few strong content blocks first, then add tabs to hold the denser material.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: WorkflowTab2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Move extra supporting material into each tab so the main page keeps its rhythm and scale.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: WorkflowTab3
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Use a few new downloaded images to keep the tab content visually fresh.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: WorkflowTab4
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Keep the tab defaults explicit so the first tab is the one people see and focus first.

TextBlock.Name: VoicesBody
TextBlock.Text: Short form praise, plus one visual, gives the tabs a more editorial feel than a simple settings pane.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: VoiceQuote1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: — Alex R.
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Lead Engineer
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: We use the main landing page for the big story, then tuck deeper detail into tabs for users who want more.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: VoiceQuote2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: — Sam T.
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: UI Architect
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Keeping the tab section image-rich makes the page feel intentional instead of empty.

TextBlock.Name: VoiceImageTitle
TextBlock.Text: One more image

TextBlock.Name: VoiceImageBody
TextBlock.Text: A familiar asset keeps the new downloads grounded in the existing sample identity.
